education.degree: Bachelor of Information Technology (Dean's Honor Roll)

bullets: Delivered end-to-end product features across UI and backend APIs for property valuation and appeal workflows using TypeScript, React/Next.js, Node.js, REST APIs, AWS Lambda, and API Gateway.
Engineered serverless automation workflows and reusable backend modules, cutting manual analysis and case preparation time by ~40\%.
Designed and documented API contracts (OpenAPI/Swagger) with consistent request/response models to minimize integration rework and strengthen maintainability.
Optimized frontend performance by ~15-25\% through Next.js dynamic imports and render optimizations, boosting first-load responsiveness for users.
Collaborated in Agile/Scrum with product and stakeholders, communicating blockers early and iterating quickly based on feedback to ship regularly.

projects.name: Real-Time Web IDE
bullets: Led development of a browser-based IDE with real-time execution in 4+ languages, handling 10k+ code runs/day with <200ms perceived latency under peak load.
Developed a Spring Boot service (Java) for execution metadata and user sessions, exposing 15+ REST APIs with standardized response contracts and documentation.
Optimized runtime performance to bring down cold-start latency by ~30\% and raise throughput by ~2x via pooling, lazy initialization, and execution caching.

projects.name: Real-Time Stock Market App
bullets: Built a full-stack platform delivering real-time price updates, 1k+ active alerts, and an AI-driven market insights module for summarization and trend explanations.
Implemented an alerting API using a microservice-based architecture (rate limiting + event handling), processing 50k+ events/day with API versioning and documentation for reliable operations.
Tuned PostgreSQL reporting tables and indexes, cutting alert query latency by ~25\% and accelerating CI/CD deploy time by ~30\% with GitHub Actions.
